detection_rule: cra_state_mcpl_init has only MC_CORE_ROUTE(core_id) delivery and no explicit link route or placement-provided routing table contract
required_response: do not prepare EBRAINS package; implement or prove inter-chip route entries first

detection_rule: attempted true two-partition cross-chip learning with only one shard_id field
required_response: add origin/target shard semantics before multi-partition learning

detection_rule: upload folder or command claims learning scale, speedup, or two-partition learning before route smoke passes
required_response: delete/rewrite package and preserve audit failure
